metadata.title: China 10" PoE Android Multi-Touch Signage Display Supplier Shortlist
metadata.description: Chinese manufacturers of 10.1" Android, PoE (IEEE 802.3af/at), capacitive multi-touch wall-mount signage/meeting-room displays as direct alternatives to the discontinued Philips Signage Solutions 10BDL3051T/00 (and successor 10BDL4551T/00). Reference product is Philips — OMITTED from outbound list as that is the benchmark being replaced.

reference_benchmark.status: discontinued / no longer available (per Philips TH storefront)

key_specs.ports: HDMI out, USB, micro SD, RJ45, external speaker connector
key_specs.extras_4551T: Built-in wall mount, built-in camera, built-in speakers, portrait/landscape/table mount

search_criteria.target_product: 10.1" Android PoE+ capacitive multi-touch wall-mount signage display, ≥1280x800, ≥5-point touch, ≥250 cd/m², CE/FCC/RoHS
priority_features: Android 8.1 or newer (Android 11 preferred for long-term support)
Willing to supply ≤100 pcs with short lead time

email_discovery_notes.method: Company websites, Made-in-China.com profiles, LinkedIn, Alibaba profile pages
email_discovery_notes.verification_status: All emails/phones are published on the supplier's own website or verified B2B profile. Confirm bounce-back behavior on first send.
email_discovery_notes.action_required: Verify each email on first outreach; cross-check RFQ response within 72h before second-round.

companies.name_en: Shenzhen Electron Technology Co., Ltd. (ELC Sign)
companies.email_notes: Generic sales alias inferred from elcsign.com domain. Phone number is published and verified.
companies.address: Building 2, Yingfeng Industrial Zone, Tantou Community, Songgang Street, Bao'an District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
companies.product_summary: 10.1" IPS 1280x800 Android PoE+ tablet (RK3288 quad-core A17, 2GB/16GB baseline, upgradable). 10-point PCAP touch. 2 MP front cam, 2x2W stereo, mic, 3.5mm, BT 4.0, WiFi b/g/n, PoE+ 802.3at 25.5W, VESA 75x75, optional RGB LED light bar and NFC.
companies.speaker: 2 x 2 W
companies.mounting: VESA 75x75 + wall bracket / glass bracket / anti-theft lock hole
companies.notes: Best-documented datasheet of the shortlist. Strong monthly capacity (150k pcs) — 12 pcs is trivial. Use this as the primary RFQ target.

companies.email_notes: Published directly on mio-lcd.com contact page.
companies.address: D202-B212, Building D, KoHo Industrial Park, Pinghu Street, Longgang District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
companies.product_summary: 10.1" IPS 1280x800 wall-mount PoE Android tablet, multiple SoC options (RK3288/RK3566/RK3568/RK3399). 10-point PCAP touch, WiFi + BT + RJ45, optional NFC/LED light bar, 2-year warranty. Medical, meeting-room, and free-standing variants available.
companies.speaker: built-in
companies.warranty: 2 years (STRONGER than ELC Sign / matches Philips)
companies.notes: Strong model range incl. meeting-room booking (LED light bar) and medical variants. 2-year warranty is a competitive advantage over ELC Sign and closer to Philips.

companies.email_notes: Inferred from raypodo.com/raypodotech.com domains. Brand also sells direct-to-consumer via Amazon/Newegg/Walmart (public retail pricing available).
companies.address: B626, Comprehensive Building, 3rd Branch of Lei Bo Zhongcheng Life Science Park, No. 22 Jinxiu East Road, Jinsha Community, Kengzi Street, Pingshan District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
companies.product_summary: 10.1" IPS 1280x800 PoE Android tablet family. SoC options RK3288/RK3566/RK3568/RK3399/RK3588 (RK3588 is flagship with 6 TOPS NPU + WiFi 6). Android 11. 10-point PCAP. RAM/ROM up to 8/128 GB. Binocular rotating camera option. Meeting-room (RFID/NFC) variant available.
companies.hdmi: HDMI input available on dedicated SKU
companies.payment_terms: T/T / credit card via retail channels
companies.lead_time_days: Immediate for retail (<50 pcs); 15-25 days ex-works for custom
gaps_vs_philips: RK3588 SoC surpasses Philips Android SoC performance
companies.notes: UNIQUE ADVANTAGE: RAYPODO sells retail on Amazon/Newegg/Walmart so you can buy 1-2 units for evaluation before committing to a 12-pc order. Also carries a HDMI-input variant for use as a signage receiver.

companies.email_notes: Inferred from Made-in-China.com profile. Verified as Gold Supplier with 85% export ratio.
companies.product_summary: 10.1" IPS PoE Android 11 tablet. OPTION for 1920x1080 FHD panel (higher than Philips 1280x800) and 450 nits brightness (HIGHER than Philips 300). RK3566 baseline (options RK3568/RK3399/RK3588). 2-8 GB RAM / 32-128 GB ROM. Rich certifications.
companies.dimensions_mm: Ultra-thin 11.5 mm body, 11.5 mm narrow bezel
gaps_vs_philips: Richest certification set in shortlist (incl. CB/PSE for Japan)
companies.notes: Best choice if the installation environment needs higher brightness (lobby with daylight) or FHD detail (dense data displays). Broadest certification footprint — good for multi-country deployment.

companies.email_notes: Both emails published on hd-focus.com product page. Named individual (Jack) available.
companies.address: 5F, 51 Building, Bantian No.3 Industrial Park, Bantian Community, Bantian Street, Longgang District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
companies.product_summary: 10.1" Android 8.1 wall-mount PoE touchscreen kiosk. 2x USB 2.0, COM port, dual power (110-240V AC or PoE). Signage-specialist manufacturer (10-year focus on digital signage).
companies.touch: Projected capacitive (multi-touch, point count to confirm)
gaps_vs_philips: Datasheet less detailed online — full spec requires RFQ
Android 8.1 exactly matches Philips 10BDL4551T (easy migration of any existing apps)
companies.notes: Signage-specialist (vs generic tablet OEM). Use as backup RFQ or for quotes on custom enclosure work. Named contact (Jack) improves response likelihood.

recommended_rfq_order.reason: ELC Sign — best-documented public datasheet, 150k/month capacity, lowest-risk baseline for 12-pc order.
MIO-LCD — 2-year warranty (best of shortlist), meeting-room variant with LED light bar matches Philips T-line positioning.
RAYPODO — order 1-2 retail units on Amazon/Newegg for evaluation (no MOQ friction), then move to factory direct for the 12-pc main order.
AIYOS — only shortlist vendor with 450-nit + FHD panel option (EXCEEDS Philips) and broadest cert set (CB/PSE included).
HDFocus — signage specialist with named rep; backup / custom-enclosure option.

budget_estimate_12pc.vs_philips_10bdl4551t_retail: Philips at ~USD 600-800/unit = ~USD 7,200-9,600 for 12 pcs; Chinese alternatives deliver 60-75% cost savings
